results.rendered_html:
āśvineya m. [aśvinyāḥ apatyaṃ ḍhak] The two Aśvins (physicians of gods).
— naḥ
1 N. of Nakula and Sahadeva, the last two of the five Pāṇḍava princes.
2 A day's journey for a horse.
